title: My Favorite Travel Memory
content: When asked about her favorite travel memory, Sophia rarely mentioned famous landmarks or luxury hotels. Instead, she remembered a simple evening spent in a small village café during a rainstorm. Strangers invited her to join their table, and conversations continued for hours despite language differences. They shared food, stories, and laughter while rain tapped gently against the windows. The experience reminded Sophia that meaningful travel moments often involve people rather than places. Years later, that unexpected evening remained one of her most cherished memories.
